title: Aurora, 33859, Palm Pals Hunk Hippo, 5In, Soft Toy, Grey
features: Let's meet the Palm Pals Hunk Hippo Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable Grey Hippo plush is filled with beans. It fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling. A wonderful gift for any occasion!

The Hunk Hippo is part of the Palm Pals Zoo collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Critters, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Hunk Hippo measures 13cm. Hunk is stubborn and indecisive and, when it comes to picking food or what clothes to wear, Hunk can take all lengths of time to decide. Wanting the perfect pal to match his picky persona, Hunk will do anything to pick the best of the best! This picky Hunk Hippo will surely win everyone's hearts!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Say Hello to the Palm Pals Hunk Hippo Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable Grey Hippo plush is filled with beans. It fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling, and it makes a wonderful gift for any occasion! Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Hunk Hippo measures 13cm. Hunk is stubborn and indecisive and, when it comes to picking food or what clothes to wear, Hunk can take all lengths of time to decide. Wanting the perfect pal to match his picky persona, Hunk will do anything to pick the best of the best! This picky Hunk Hippo will surely win everyone's hearts! Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
